short.en: 3M-mounted hook with a wide saddle so the headband doesn't deform.
short.sl: Obešalnik z 3M nalepko, ki ima široko sedlo, da se naglavni trak ne deformira.

description.en: Off-the-shelf hooks crease the headband foam after a month. This one has a 32 mm radius cradle to spread load. Mounts under the desk lip with a 3M VHB pad — no drilling, holds 1.5 kg pulled straight down in a 24 h test.
description.sl: Trgovinski obešalniki zmečkajo peno po enem mesecu. Ta ima zgib s polmerom 32 mm, ki obremenitev razporedi. Pritrdi se pod rob mize z 3M VHB lepilom — brez vrtanja, drži 1,5 kg navpično v 24-urnem testu.
